case_title: SARAH LOFTUS VS. DUSTIN GUILLORY et al

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MODESTO FOOD DISTRIBUTORS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT DUSTIN GUILLORY WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GARY KAEL--VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JONATHAN CHEE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2014 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY LOFTUS, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLORY, DUSTIN MODESTO FOOD DISTRIBUTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED DEC-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MODESTO FOOD DISTRIBUTORS
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DUSTIN GUILLORY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-07-2014 AT 3:30 PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOFTUS, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODESTO FOOD DISTRIBUTORS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00, DEFENDANT DUSTIN GUILLORY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
